title: Hypixel Skyblock Package
description: A Minecraft Hypixel Skyblock Package for the 1.8.9.
body:
# Minecraft Hypixel Skyblock Modpack

This Minecraft Hypixel Skyblock Modpack is specifically designed for players looking to optimize their experience on the Hypixel Skyblock server. With a carefully curated selection of mods that both enhance gameplay quality and add useful features, this modpack provides everything you need to play more efficiently and successfully.

---

## Key Features

### Gameplay Enhancements
- **ChatTriggers** allows you to activate custom scripts through chat, enhancing your interaction with the game.
- **NotEnoughUpdates (NEU)** provides you with comprehensive item information in Hypixel Skyblock, including prices, values, and uses, giving you a competitive edge.
- **Dungeon Rooms** and **Dungeons Guide** are essential for dungeon players, offering tips and a clearer understanding of dungeon layouts, helping you progress faster and more effectively.

### Quality of Life Improvements
- **Controlling** ensures you have full control over your keybindings, making gameplay smoother.
- **Patcher** resolves minor bugs and performance issues, improving the overall game experience.
- **Hypixel Autocomplete** makes entering commands and player names quicker and more convenient.

### Player Information & Combat Tools
- **LevelHead** displays the level of other players above their heads, giving you instant insight into their progress.
- **SkyblockAddons** and **Skytils** introduce a wide range of QoL features, such as better item management, visual alerts, and more detailed tooltips to enhance your gameplay.

### Task & Collection Management
- **Cowlection** helps you keep your Skyblock tasks organized and easily accessible.
- **SkyBlockcatia** and **SkyHanni** provide valuable information related to stats, items, and skills, making it easier to track your progress.

### Multiplayer Enhancements
- **Essential Mod** enhances multiplayer interactions, making communication and gameplay more fluid.
- **Scrollable Tooltips** allows you to read long item descriptions with ease by enabling scrolling for tooltips.

With all these mods combined, this modpack offers a comprehensive solution to streamline your gameplay experience, improve your efficiency, and enhance your time in Hypixel Skyblock.

---

A big thank you to all the amazing mod creators for making this pack possible! Check out their work on different mod websites.

---

## Disclaimer

The mods included in The Minecraft Hypixel Skyblock Modpack have been carefully selected to comply with the general rules of the Hypixel Skyblock server. While we believe all included mods fall within acceptable usage guidelines, some may be in a "gray area" depending on the specific server rules.

We recommend players check the rules of Hypixel Skyblock and any other server they play on to ensure full compliance. This modpack is intended to enhance the player's experience and improve gameplay efficiency, while respecting server policies.
